checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`, which now prefers `window.__JONES_FASTLANE_SESSION__` and falls back to `localStorage.jones_fastlane_save` only when no live bridge is present. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

latest_authoritative_state.checkpoint_summary: Persona A resumed directly from the authoritative Week 6 summary state at `₡616 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 15 / Sore Legs 6h`, kept stable manual control after the AI handoff, then immediately hit the forced `PANIC ATTACK ON THE MAG-LEV` opener. The only available branch triggered burnout, charged an emergency `₡250` medical fee, forfeited the full cycle, and closed authoritative Week 7 at `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35` with `TRAUMA_REBOOT (312h)`. The Week 7 checkpoint had to be rewritten directly from the live session because the helper export path still read a stale shadow save.
latest_authoritative_state.next_slice: Resume Persona A from the authoritative Week 7 checkpoint or live summary state in `phase11-safe-grinder`, advance exactly one completed in-game week, start from the Week 7 summary anchor `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35 / Trauma Reboot 312h`, confirm whether the AI handoff remains stable, and verify whether any deterministic labor route survives while `TRAUMA_REBOOT` is active. Treat GitHub issues #6, #7, and #8 as fixed baseline behavior: a burnout-triggered end turn should now show a visible `Emergency Trauma Team` sanity row with a reconciled sanity total, an automatic global week opener should only fire when at least two valid branches remain after requirement filtering, and `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:status` / `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export` should report `browser_state_source: live_session` whenever the live browser page is already authoritative. Only flag any of those bugs again if a fresh Week 8 run still diverges on the live build. Write the canonical `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-08.md` before exporting the Week 8 checkpoint.

start_state.checkpoint: Continued from the authoritative Week 6 summary/checkpoint state already loaded in `phase11-safe-grinder`.
start_state.conditions: Sore Legs (6h remaining)` at manual start

high_signal_findings: The restored Week 6 throughput did not carry into Week 7. A single forced opener can still erase the entire labor line before any manual recovery route is available.

The week introduces a new summary-integrity failure mode. The visible sanity line items total `-25`, but `pendingTurnSummary.totals.sanityChange` reports `+20` because the hidden burnout recovery is applied to the end state without appearing as its own summary event.

The checkpoint helper remained unsafe for this slice. `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:status` and `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export` continued reading a stale pre-Week-6 shadow save, so the authoritative Week 7 checkpoint had to be rewritten from the live session payload instead. GitHub issue `#8` fixes that workflow bug after this slice; preserve this note as historical pre-fix evidence.
blockers_and_followups: **Checkpoint Export:** `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-07-save.json` with metadata at `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-07-meta.json` was corrected manually from live session state after the helper exported stale data. Future slices should treat that manual correction as complete and rely on the post-issue-`#8` helper baseline unless the live build diverges again.

**Next Slice:** Resume from the authoritative Week 7 summary/checkpoint at `₡286 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 40% / Sanity 35 / Trauma Reboot 312h`, verify whether Week 8 returns manual control cleanly again, and measure whether Safe Grinder can rebuild any stable labor route while trauma recovery is active.

action_constraints: Advance exactly one completed in-game week unless a blocker or unusually high-signal audit event stops the slice earlier.
Update run-state.json plus the relevant workflow markdown files in the same run.
Export a fresh checkpoint after every authoritative completed week.
Prefer compact state probes and selector recipes over broad DOM or file dumps.
